attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ACTION, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ACTIVITY_RESULT_CODE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ACTIVITY_STATUS, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ASSIGNED_USER, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.BEGIN_DATE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.DUE_DATE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.END_DATE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ERROR_NAME, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ERROR_STACK, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.EXECUTION_TIME, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ITEM_KEY, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ITEM_TYPE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.NOTIFICATION_ID, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.PERFORMED_BY, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.PROCESS_ACTIVITY, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES,
 (
 select ITEM_KEY ,ITEM_TYPE ,PROCESS_ACTIVITY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES
 minus
 select ITEM_KEY ,ITEM_TYPE ,PROCESS_ACTIVITY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WF_ITEM_ACTIVITY_STATUSES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ITEM_KEY = STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ITEM_KEY and  ACM.ITEM_TYPE = STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.ITEM_TYPE and ACM.PROCESS_ACTIVITY = STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.PROCESS_ACTIVITY and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WF_ITM_ACTVTY_STATUSES.REFRESH_DATETIME
